daiKichi.label: 大吉
daiKichi.message: All is well and the path ahead is bright. Fortune favors you — move forward with confidence.

kichi.label: 吉
kichi.message: Things proceed smoothly. Act diligently and good results will follow. Seize the moment.

chuKichi.label: 中吉
chuKichi.message: Progress builds steadily. Patience will bring your efforts to fruition. Act with care.

shoKichi.label: 小吉
shoKichi.message: Advance step by step. Caution brings no harm. Stay grounded and rewards will come.

sueMichi.label: 末吉
sueMichi.message: The timing is not yet right. Patience is your ally. Brighter days lie on the horizon.

kyo.label: 凶
kyo.message: Take great care in all matters. Misfortune can be turned by a sincere heart. Reflect and persevere.
